Limitation of Liability.preferred: Mutual cap at 2x annual contract value
Limitation of Liability.fallback: Mutual cap at 1x annual contract value
Limitation of Liability.red_line: No uncapped liability; no unlimited indemnification

Termination.preferred: Mutual termination for convenience with 90 days notice
Termination.red_line: Must have termination for cause provision

Indemnification.preferred: Mutual indemnification for IP infringement and breach
Indemnification.fallback: Vendor indemnifies for IP; mutual for breach

Confidentiality.red_line: Must include carve-outs for legally compelled disclosure

Data Protection.preferred: GDPR and CCPA compliant; DPA required
Data Protection.red_line: No unlimited right to use customer data

IP Assignment.preferred: Customer owns all work product; vendor retains pre-existing IP with license

Payment Terms.red_line: No prepayment exceeding 25% of total contract value

Non-Compete.preferred: No non-compete or maximum 6 months in narrow scope

Governing Law.fallback: State of Delaware or New York
Governing Law.red_line: Must be US jurisdiction; no foreign arbitration
